summary: Remediation materially improved the exact-HEAD evidence: the targeted regression suite, integration, E2E, typecheck and build records are current; E2E has a verified machine artifact; and target conformance is now bound to 8bdef4a3 and improves the origin/main baseline from 81 to 80 violations. The gate still needs changes because the regenerated canonical pr-prepare remains ready_for_pr_create=false with eight execution blockers, seven stale review/evidence artifacts, one missing responsibility-specific unit_regression item, and no canonical current-HEAD adjudication record. The fresh independent adjudication additionally identifies AC-2 and AC-6 as not demonstrated because no capable real provider completed the public one-command commit plus independent-review path.
inspection_summary: Re-inspected the same strict-HEAD surface after remediation without reopening the lifecycle. Confirmed the full targeted unit command, focused integration and verified E2E records, rich failure-mode/flow/path-surface scenarios, exact-HEAD target conformance, fresh independent adjudication artifact, and a newly generated canonical blocking-gates view. Design SSOT, run-session ownership, human authority boundaries, and predecessor closure remain sound. Remaining blockers are exact and recoverable: record or resolve the capable-provider acceptance gap, canonically import adjudication, close and record this current review lifecycle, refresh the remaining stale review artifacts, and add the responsibility-specific telemetry ingestion unit evidence.
judgment_delta: Initial judgment before remediation: needs_changes because verification, adjudication and conformance were stale or incomplete. Final judgment after remediation: still needs_changes, but the conformance and broad verification findings are resolved; the decisive remaining evidence is the canonical eight-blocker pr-prepare result plus the independent not_demonstrated verdicts for AC-2 and AC-6.

findings.title: Canonical current-HEAD readiness remains blocked
findings.detail: The post-remediation blocking-gates view still reports overall_status=needs_verification, ready_for_pr_create=false and execution_gate.status=blocked. Artifact inconsistency has improved from 13 to seven items, and the production-path verification gates are no longer listed as execution blockers, but the current gate_evidence lifecycle is still open and older/current review artifacts still require current-git closure or refresh.
evidence: node bin/vibepro.js pr prepare . --story-id story-vibepro-one-command-pr-ready-closure --view blocking-gates at 2026-07-23T20:59:42.101Z: ready_for_pr_create=false; execution_gate.status=blocked; blocking_gate_count=8
.vibepro/pr/story-vibepro-one-command-pr-ready-closure/pr-prepare.json: gate:artifact_consistency reports 7 recorded verification/review artifacts not bound to the current git state
.vibepro/pr/story-vibepro-one-command-pr-ready-closure/pr-prepare.json: gate_evidence remains running and must be closed and recorded before readiness can advance
findings.required_recovery: Close and canonically record this same review lifecycle, refresh the remaining stale review artifacts against the frozen git state, rerun pr-prepare, and require ready_for_pr_create=true before claiming PR-ready.

findings.title: One responsibility-specific unit evidence item is still missing
findings.detail: The remediation replaces the narrow two-test unit record with the intended seven-file targeted regression suite and the canonical Gate now treats unit, integration, E2E, build and typecheck as current supporting or strong evidence. One matched responsibility contract nevertheless remains unsatisfied: vibepro.runtime_cost.telemetry_ingestion still requires evidence explicitly classified as unit_regression. The missing machine artifact on unit/build/typecheck lowers their strength but is not itself listed as a separate execution blocker once the verified E2E artifact and current command records are considered.
evidence: .vibepro/pr/story-vibepro-one-command-pr-ready-closure/verification-evidence.json updated 2026-07-23T20:54:57.990Z: seven-file targeted unit suite current; integration 4/4; E2E 5/5 with verified TAP artifact; build and typecheck pass

.vibepro/pr/story-vibepro-one-command-pr-ready-closure/pr-prepare.json: gate:responsibility_authority reports one missing item, responsibility_id=vibepro.runtime_cost.telemetry_ingestion and evidence=unit_regression
.vibepro/pr/story-vibepro-one-command-pr-ready-closure/pr-prepare.json: unit, integration, build and typecheck records are current but have artifact_quality=missing_artifact
findings.required_recovery: Record the already exercised telemetry-ingestion regression with the required unit_regression scenario/classification, preferably with a structured artifact, then rerun pr-prepare.

findings.title: Capable-provider acceptance remains unproven and adjudication is not yet canonical
findings.detail: A fresh exact-HEAD independent adjudication artifact now exists and judges all sixteen engineering-judgment items sound. It deliberately marks AC-2 and AC-6 not_demonstrated: the production-shaped fixture proves the contract and the real unavailable-provider run proves typed pre-mutation stopping, but neither proves one public command completing commit, verification and independent review through a capable real provider. AC-8 is correctly classified as the post-PR/post-CI closure phase and does not block initial PR creation by itself. The QA adjudication has not yet been recorded into the canonical adjudication stores, so pr-prepare still reports all acceptance and judgment verdicts missing.
evidence: .vibepro/qa/adjudication-8bdef4a3.json: exact-HEAD verdicts demonstrate AC-1, AC-3, AC-4, AC-5 and AC-7; AC-2 and AC-6 are not_demonstrated; AC-8 is a non-initial-PR-blocking phase-two closure
.vibepro/pr/story-vibepro-one-command-pr-ready-closure/pr-prepare.json after remediation: gate:evidence_adjudication and gate:judgment_dag_adjudication still report no current-head canonical verdicts
.vibepro/pr/story-vibepro-one-command-pr-ready-closure/traceability.json: AC-3 and S-001 remain weakly mapped until clause-specific proof/adjudication is canonically recorded
findings.required_recovery: Resolve AC-2 and AC-6 with an observed capable real-provider public-command smoke or an explicit authorized acceptance-scope decision; record the fresh evidence and judgment verdicts through vibepro adjudicate record; then rerun pr-prepare.
